# Task: Make Dashboard Responsive

## User Request

"The dashboard doesn't work on mobile, can you fix it?"

## Context

The dashboard page uses fixed-width CSS layout that breaks on mobile devices.
It needs responsive CSS so it works on screens of all sizes.

## Files

- `dashboard.html` — the dashboard page with fixed-width layout
- `style.css` — the stylesheet with fixed pixel widths

## Requirements

- Add a viewport meta tag if missing
- Replace fixed pixel widths with responsive alternatives
- Add CSS media queries for mobile breakpoints
- Dashboard should be usable on screens as narrow as 320px
